name: the classifier flags an unrecognized rule for the Tier-2 LLM rather than silently dropping it
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-rule.sh" --title 'Be excellent' --prose 'Always strive for quality and kindness.' --json > c.json 2>e.txt; grep -q 'confidence=low' e.txt && node -e 'const c=require(process.cwd()+"/c.json");if(c.needs_tier2_llm!==true)process.exit(1)' && echo flagged-not-dropped 1>&2
